description: First runtime fixture closeout and next queue selection

decision_notes: The first recipe can be used as an offline runtime/test fixture.
The fixture is not a saved player deck and is not automatically visible in UI.
Bot/playbook runtime use still needs a separate gate.

next_queue.title: Fixture Consumption and Second-Slice Scale Gate
next_queue.goal: Validate how the first fixture can be consumed safely, then decide whether to scale recipe work to the second slice.

tasks.title: Offline fixture schema validator
tasks.goal: Validate runtime fixture artifacts independently from the M38 generator.

tasks.title: Fixture-to-deck text exporter
tasks.goal: Export the fixture as reviewable count-line deck text without adding it to saved decks.

tasks.title: Headless fixture load smoke
tasks.goal: Load the fixture through offline tooling/headless paths without UI or bot mutation.

tasks.title: Second-slice recipe scale decision
tasks.goal: Decide whether Oracle Think Tank moves into the same recipe repair pipeline.
